description: Publicly available violation data used for the current month's SMS (Safety Measurement System) calculations. Contains details on each violation used in SMS calculations, including an identifier linking the violation to the inspection in which it was cited, the violation code, violation description, and information related to the SMS methodology.

fields.description: Unique identification number for each inspection
Unique number assigned to a company by the DOT
Name of the BASIC (Behavior Analysis and Safety Improvement Category)
Indicates whether the violation is identified as an Out-Of-Service violation. 'TRUE' means the violation is OOS.
The weight assigned to a violation if it is identified as an Out-Of-Service violation
The severity weight assigned to a violation
The time weight assigned to a violation
Total severity weight of a violation
The description of the violation group
The unit a violation is cited against
